categories.name: Decentralized Lottery
categories.content: A decentralized lottery is a blockchain-based lottery system that conducts draws through smart contracts.

categories.name: Flaunch Ecosystem
categories.content: Flaunch Ecosystem consists of tokens launched via flaunch.gg.

categories.name: Robinhood Chain Meme
categories.content: Meme coins native to Robinhood Chain.

categories.name: Zora Creator
categories.content: Zora Creator Coins are profile-level tokens on the Zora platform, a blockchain-based social network focused on the creator economy. Each Zora account has its own unique Creator Coin, represented by the user's username as the ticker symbol (e.g., $username).

categories.name: Yoink.fun Launchpad
categories.content: Tokens launched through Yoink (https://yoinkai.fun/), an agentic launch and trading terminal on Robinhood Chain.

categories.name: Bankr Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokens deployed through Bankr (https://bankr.bot/) via the Bankr Terminal, Bankr agent/API/CLI, or a @bankrbot social command.

categories.name: TRON Meme
categories.content: Meme coins native to the TRON network.

categories.name: Fighting Games
categories.content: Fighting game centered around combat between two or more number of characters.

categories.name: Retail
categories.content: Retail involves the sale of goods and services to consumers for their personal use, rather than for resale on blockchain.

categories.name: Emoji-Themed
categories.content: Meme coins related to emoji.

categories.name: Remora Markets Tokenized rStocks
categories.content: Remora Markets Tokenized rStocks are on-chain tokens that represent economic exposure to traditional stocks, with each token typically backed 1:1 by the underlying security held through a regulated custodian

categories.name: Cat-Themed
categories.content: Meme coins which are inspired by cat.

categories.name: Liquid Staked HYPE
categories.content: Liquid staked HYPE is a tokenized representation of staked HYPE that can be traded or used in various DeFi applications.

categories.name: Pump.fun Creator
categories.content: Pump.fun creator tokens are Solana-based memecoins tied to influencers, blending streaming culture with DeFi.

categories.name: Yield Tokenization Product
categories.content: Yield tokenization product refers to converting the expected future yield or returns from an asset into tradable tokens on a blockchain, allowing for the trading, management, and optimization of yield independently from the underlying asset.

categories.name: Education
categories.content: Decentralized educational platform built on blockchain technology.

categories.name: daos.fun Ecosystem
categories.content: daos.fun Ecosystem consists of tokens that have active hedge funds on daos.fun.

categories.name: Aave Tokens
categories.content: Aave Tokens are balance tokens on the Aave Protocol which represents a lending balance on the Aave money market.

categories.name: Duck-Themed
categories.content: Meme coins which are inspired by duck.

categories.name: Reddit Points
categories.content: Reddit Community Points are blockchain tokens that are owned and controlled by a specific Reddit community. With these point tokens, a community member can own a piece of their favorite subreddit. The points can be earned through contributions in the community such as post creation, comments, and content moderations.
